comments.body:
@sekyHC thanks, looks good and I would like to merge it. could you please squash the commits together? it would just make it a bit more clean in the log since is a single change. then I'll merge it

(I can clarify if what I mean is not clear)
I found that I could squash from the webui. nothing is requested from you now, thanks @sekyHC :D

> I found that I could squash from the webui. nothing is requested from you now, thanks @sekyHC :D

Sorry, I was not online. Yes, you can squash commits when merging, unless it has been disabled in GitHub repo settings.
